_comment: Ad-creative prompt library for Client Ready. Keyed to reference/proof/angles/main-angles.md (active) + CLAUDE.md positioning. Each visual leaves deliberate negative space for a headline overlaid later. Edit freely — fal-image.py reads this file.
quality_suffix: photorealistic, candid UGC style, shot on a phone, natural available light, authentic and un-staged, real texture, not glossy stock photography, high detail, subtle film grain
headline_space_suffix: generous clean negative space in the upper third for a bold headline overlay, uncluttered composition

9-to-5.label: Won't tell you to quit your 9-to-5
9-to-5.prompt: A person in their late 30s in business-casual clothing working on a laptop at a kitchen table in the early morning before work, a commuter bag and car keys beside them, soft dawn light through the window, focused and quietly hopeful — building a side business without quitting the day job.

one-afternoon.label: Validate your offer in one afternoon
one-afternoon.prompt: A relaxed solo entrepreneur at a tidy home-office desk in warm mid-afternoon light, a single sheet of paper and one open laptop in front of them, coffee half-finished, calm and satisfied posture — the feeling of finishing something important in a single afternoon. Minimal, uncluttered desk.

ladder.label: $27 low-ticket to $5K high-ticket
ladder.prompt: A confident coach in a comfortable home office just after closing a client on a video call, leaning back with a small genuine smile, laptop open, warm and grounded 'this is working now' energy, tasteful and understated — not flashy wealth.

alignment.label: Build what fits who you actually are
alignment.prompt: An authentic, at-ease coach sitting by a window with natural light, calm and genuinely themselves, no hustle or stress on their face, quiet confidence — the opposite of burnout. Warm, honest portrait with breathing room around them.

ai-90.label: AI does 90% of the heavy lifting
ai-90.prompt: A focused solo business owner at a modern desk, hands on the keyboard of a laptop with a soft screen glow, one clean interface visible, thoughtful expression — a human clearly in control while software does the heavy lifting. Modern, efficient, warm rather than cold-tech.

overwhelm.label: The before — content chaos / overthinking
overwhelm.prompt: A tired coach at a cluttered desk late at night, surrounded by scattered sticky notes and multiple browser tabs and a notebook full of half-ideas, head resting on one hand, visibly overwhelmed and spinning their wheels — the 'stuck before it clicks' moment. Moody low light.

objection-sales-calls.label: I stopped doing sales calls
objection-sales-calls.prompt: A relaxed coach on a couch with a laptop, phone face-down on the armrest, unbothered and calm — pointedly NOT on a stressful sales call, letting the offer sell itself. Bright, easy, casual home setting with soft daylight.
